# Copiapo

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Amplificacion Sismica](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/amplificacion-sismica/)
- [Anclajes](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/anclajes/)
- [Asentamiento Diferencial](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/asentamiento-diferencial/)
- [Asentamientos](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/asentamientos/)
- [Calicatas Exploratorias](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/calicatas-exploratorias/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/cimentaciones/)
- [Cimentaciones Rellenos](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/cimentaciones-rellenos/)
- [Clasificacion Suelos](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/clasificacion-suelos/)
- [Compactacion Dinamica](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/compactacion-dinamica/)
- [Deep Soil Mixing](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/deep-soil-mixing/)
- [Dilatometro](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/dilatometro/)
- [Drenaje Geotecnico](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/drenaje-geotecnico/)

- [Erosion Suelos](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/erosion-suelos/)

- [Factor Seguridad](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/factor-seguridad/)
- [Falla Taludes](https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/falla-taludes/)

## Contact
- Website: https://copiapo.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.com/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
